productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Classroom Blue Flip Flops
description: The Classroom flip flops from adidas is /created for the carefree college-goer, offering comfort and style at its best. Pair it with a tee and your favourite slept-in style denims. Upper Synthetic twill straps in a thong style, with a toe separator PU footbed for cushioned comfort Printed footbed for style Outsole TPR outsole with herringbone lugs for maximum traction Flip Flops care Wipe off dirt with a moist cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
